Only wish that we stayed longer to enjoy the hotel even more   The staff were so friendly and nothing was too much trouble The room was fabulous good toiletries provided and the most comfortable bed ever

The noise outside our bedroom from roadworks but that wasn t the hotel s fault There is nothing to dislike about this hotel   This is a lovely hotel to stay at and a great location The staff are always helpful and accommodating from the welcoming doorman who has a smile whatever time of the day and reception staff to the managers Simone in particular is always there to welcome us We are returning guests Nothing is a problem for her and we were fortunate enough to be upgraded too It s the little touches that count sometimes hand written welcome cards and wine are waiting for us Be loyal to them and they will be loyal back
Nothing  Staff very welcoming and helpful nothing too much trouble and great knowledge Beautiful building Rooms are a nice size and lovely facilities Great location
Nothing  Everything the bed was so comfortable The toiletries lovely All the little extras like slippers robe and fluffy towels Rain shower spotlessly clean
Liked everything  Bed extra comfy staff so friendly Given prosecco chocolate for our anniversary and my husband s birthday which was a lovely surprise
I foudn the room airconditioned to be very cold and it took a long while to warm up   Great service from the staff I got this on a bargain last minute deal and it was fabulous

No complaints at all  Everything was about this hotel was just incredible The room was absolutely massive and I cant believe the value for money The best hotel I have ever stayed in in London by far Me and my boyfriend stayed here for our anniversary this weekend and it made everything all the more romantic Location is also fantastic 2 minute walk away from moorgate station

Name on B com was different to the actual name of the hotel so caused quite a bit of confusion trying to find our way after 21 hours of flying   Excellent hotel in a fantastic location Within walking distance of the Tower of London Tower Bridge St Pauls Cathedral and the point to collect our hop on hop off bus Very accommodating staff enjoyed our stay
We could have stayed longer   Lovely style and we were upgraded for free to the WOW room as it was our honeymoon 4 poster bed and bathroom that overlooked the bedroom

Staff were a little too attentive at times Felt a little uncomfortable At the 5th 6th time of being asked if I m ok in the lobby Relax a little   Staff lovely Very attentive perhaps a little too attentive Relax Great location fur where our activities were Nice room massive bathroom Great shower good free stuff Yep really good

the price of breakfast was awful how a hotel can justify that price is beyond belief just went out and found a great breakfast for a fraction of the price  excellent customer service and friendly staff lovely property and very comfortable rooms and bathrooms

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: one of the worst experiences I ever had it s an apartment at few minutes walk from the main hotel the receptionist gave us the wrong key and we had to call several time and finally walk back ourselves twice before they found out the error they didn t even apologise for that they ended up totally ruining our evening there weren t enough towels in the room and they didn t offer to bring any we had to walk back to the reception the following day to get them the wifi wasn t working fortunately now europe is free roaming the last day we had to leave early so we asked the receptionist if we could leave the keys inside she told us yes so we did few days later I was charged for late check out I called them and explained the situation they promised a reimbourse which of course never came   nice apartment

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Bad smell from bathroom sink at our suite room rm 108 Despite the comfortable bed and sheet we could not sleep at all due to odd smell from the bathroom Thus we were very very tired throughout the travel Must be from improper plumbing of sewage That bad smell overwhelmed all other great facilities and location of this hotel Later we figured the bad smell from the sink where we wash face and brush teeth thus blocked it with water   Convenient location free local phone with data breakfast

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Nothing actually   Very friendly staff We were 30 minutes late to check out we were there for a big event but they didn t even mention it Great room we had the studio 5mins walking from hotel really nice decorated with loads of facilities

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: It was the worst experience ever Unprofessional personnel messed up reservations room which has never been properly clean Awful experience No proper air con in 37C heat and room with remains of previous guest dirty coffee cups and dirty surfaces broken lamps the list can go on

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: They upgraded our room when we arrived since it was very hot in Paris at the time We ended up in a beautiful spacious airconditioned room The staff were all very helpful and friendly The location is perfect for exploring Paris on foot or by public transport The Louvre is literally around the corner But when you are in the room it is quiet and comfortable Don t miss the wine bars and restaurants in the little side street one block away

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Breakfast was very nice but a bit pricey at 15 euros   The hotel is centrally located but on a quiet street with pleasant cafes steps away The staff was knowledgable pleasant cheerful and accommodating The property was pristinely kept The cushioned bay window seat in the room and the elevator were both enjoyed appreciated by my mother The linens were crisp fresh and sumptuous The train station to the airport is a short walk away Excellent choice for travelers on the go

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The wine dispenser in the lobby wasn t working properly so we weren t able to get a drink at the hotel not really a big deal I m clutching at straws here The rooms were very compact but we knew that when we booked It is Paris afterall   A lot of thought had been put into the decor finishing touches that really maximised the small space and gave the room a luxury feel It was also on a very quiet street well it was on Sunday The staff were extremely friendly

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: My room was functional but very small But it is Paris   The staff were some of the most welcoming and helpful I have come across in all my travels Awesome friendly concept and location

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The wallpaper Typical French so I suppose one should expect it The shower and toilet facilities were not fully separated from the bedroom area Should be a complete wall  Excellent location Staff were very helpful and knowledgeable

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: not super clean lift only allow one person with luggage   excellent location creative design safe and just like a home staff very nice and helpful Found one of best breakfast just opposite the door

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: This hotel had every bad wifi problem it was unsecured yet also required a crazy long form to be filled out before you were granted access it was super weak and also disconnected you every few hours The air conditioning was very weak and quiet which sucks if you like it as background noise Also if there were minibars in the room this hotel would really be improved There is a little wine bar downstairs but they were completely out of white wine   The staff was SUPER friendly and nice they even let me check in early The decorating was just wonderful and those pretty pops of color and great wallpaper made a difference in my enjoyment of the room There are lots of comfortable pillows and a comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Our only negative comment is that on the first night the room was really warm The thermostat had been set to 25 degrees which was quite frustrating but after we fixed it the temperature was fine   The room we had was perfect and the location was great We really liked the serve yourself bar and felt it was a nice touch The hotel staff were really helpful in providing tips and recommendations in the area

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: We thought we were renting a room in the hotel but instead it was an airbnb like apartment They had only 1 set of keys so we had to coordinate which was very inconvenient On top of this you can t buzz in the person who comes later from the apartment but instead have to go down 7 floors to open the door

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Thought I was staying within the hotel however realised the studio is outside of the hotel 500m away in a seperate apartment building which upon checking in in the evening was not ideal Had I known this understood when booking via booking com I would ve opted to stay in the hotel for the comforts of well a hotel The bed is not 100 secure and there is no real service in the apartment unless it s prompted   The decor was really lovely for an apartment ample room for a single business trip The staff we re great when I was in the actual hotel at check in out only they were able to assist with my reservations and business bookings The hotel looks amazing location decor warmth Great thing about this studio is the location and that it s opposite from Claus breakfast dining

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The bed was good but it could have been a bit bigger   Beautifully decorated rooms and very spacious for hotels in Paris Location is excellent and the staff is very friendly and flexible Good place to stay if you re going for a weekend trip and want to explore the highlights of Paris On one side of the bed there were USB connections to easily charge your phone Bathroom was small but cleverly designed to optimize the space

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The walls are not very sound proof   The staff is super friendly and helpful The hotel location is amazing While the rooms are small the very new and colorful interior made the rooms very pleasant

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: well the apartment is literally not in the hotel I noticed that in both rooms there s only one small trash bin in the room As in the apartment the bathroom is quite narrow   we booked the Studio Attrape R ve It was more than what a hotel could provide Even it s not located in the hotel but it is really cozy and comfortable for a couple like us Really good location and tbh it s like a home for us in Paris We decided to book for one more night but unfortunately the apartment had been booked So we had to move to Junior Suite Sans Mod ration in hotel Crayon Rouge It has really modern design With lots of space in the room it has a huge bath tube also with massage function Lucky for the girls the room also has a make up desk In general this hotel apartment is really good for couples young people to come and enjoy the best experience in Paris

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: I called to extend my stay but reception was not aware of this upon my arrival The next day it was still not arranged as receptionists did not communicate with each other I tried to have an iron board in my room but they failed to accomodate this TWICE Upon arrival they did not mention I had to pay in order to have my room cleaned I stayed at the appartment 5min from the hotel One of the receptionists cursed on the phone when hearing her colleagues did not do the work I would not at all recommend this hotel   Good placement near fabric streets and close to Louvre

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Nothing  Great location walkable distance to major attractions Nice cafe bistro near by friendly staff newly renovated nice furnishings comfortable bed and pillows

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Excellent location for all sorts of activities including sightseeing and shopping in Paris Staff was in all occasions very friendly and extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Very close to the Louvre in one direction and restaurant area in the other Easy walk to both Fresh contemporary design Boutique size Helpful friendly staff

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: No conditioner provided just shampoo body wash A minor complaint Towels are very stiff and scratchy   The location of this hotel is ideal The spaces from the lobby to the hallways to the rooms have a hip well curated vibe The walls are pretty sound proof even though I was located right near the elevator I didn t hear other guest very much ever so slightly if someone was talking loudly as they got on off the elevator But not a peep from within the rooms The bed was very comfortable and I slept well The room is small but it s Paris so I expect small A tiny little gem of a hotel

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Can be a bit quite at night and weekend due to in business and office area  Good location for sightseeing close to area with lots of cafe and night outs

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The breakfast wasn t fresh And minimum options The cleaner getting in the room twice without knocking the door   The staff were so nice and very smiley face all the time loving helping you It was my honeymoon and they were very happy to me they put a bottle of wine and desert with a big card plus flowers on the bed it was amazing I really love it Thanks a lot

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: the bed is a bit too high but not really an issue Room is really small but ok for 1 traveler so basically nothing really bothers me a nice place   the location is perfect just in the heart of everything i d like to see all within walking distance and convenient to CDG airport as well Decoration is in cute active style not like traditional hotel kinda like it No issue on Wifi connection i didn t try the breakfast so no comment Staff is nice as well

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Despite a guaranteed check in of 3 00pm we weren t able to check till after 4 30pm which was frustrating   I loved this hotel It was so cute and had a real designer feel Our bed was super comfortable and the room was quiet

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: For the price it would have been good to have housekeeping and or breakfast included Although it is difficult to compare what is reasonable for Paris as well as the differences with staying in the Studio vs a normal room in the hotel   We stayed in the Studio Attrape Reve and given that it is in a residential apartment building we really felt we got the local experience It was a fantastic combination of the support of a hotel with the independence and local experience of a rented apartment Grabbing some local produce and fresh bread for breakfast was a great way to start the day It helped to have the kitchen amenities of the studio so we could refrigerate things and make eggs for breakfast etc The studio itself was small like all things in Paris but it was beautiful and exactly like the pictures The location was fantastic and we spent so much of our time in Paris walking Service was excellent and staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Square pillow was wrong shape for me There was a rectangular one too Shelf over washbasin I kept banging my head on it No tea coffee stuff or kettle in room Room was small Breakfast area is just a communal table We went to nearby Pain Quotidien instead Staff are overworked at times with just one person to clear away breakfast dishes and man reception on the day we left   Rain shower Location near Palais Royal gardens You can walk to everything Staff are mostly smily and always helpful Decor Fizzy water machine in communal kitchen Small sitting area in lobby Lots of lighting options

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The double rooms were a little tight for two people but really we only slept in them we were out sightseeing 95 of our trip so not a big problem   Bed was amazing pillows especially Breakfast fantastic staff were so friendly and couldn t do enough for us A 100 would return

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: it would be good if water boiler could be provided in the room  excellent location easy access to metro bus major tourist spots within walking distances and safe area lovely deco in the room

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Breakfast could have been included for 190 Euro s per night This is an extra 15 Euro s   Great location Well decorated hotel including bedrooms Good sized rooms Worth the extra money compared to Hotel Crayon sister hotel around the corner I ve stayed in both for business The rooms in the sister hotel are starting to become tired Would definitely recommend Hotel Crayon Rouge for everybody

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: the location very central and convenient very calm I was upgraded from a basic room to a suite because they had availabilities The room service is very qualitative italian dishes would definitely come back

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Dirty towels were taken one day and no fresh provided and we had to ask twice not a big problem though Some people may not like the self service style kitchen however we enjoyed it  Friendly staff and a relaxing environment that felt like home Very quirky place that was a little different in a good way 5mins walk from the louvre for easy exploration

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The WIFI in our room was intermittent Had many problems keeping a stable connection during our 5 nights stay and we were asked to connect to other rooms WIFI instead The room was extremely small We almost couldn t open our luggage They should just do away with the wardrobe table and chair which wasted space in that small room The toilet sink bath area has no door If you re conscious about that please do not book this room not sure about other rooms in this hotel I was staying with my sister and the open concept did feel awkward   The location was excellent All the staff I ve encountered at the front desk were friendly and approachable

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Small window in my room 209 it wasn t a problem because I stayed only one night and arrived late in the evening but I suspect that may become more an issue if I had to stay longer  I liked the decoration and style of the hotel The breakfast was excellent and the staff extremely helpful and polite

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: Unfortunately the room did not have an actual window which was not clear in the description or photos It was a window looking directly on a grey air shaft so no natural light at all This made it feel very unrelaxing and confining I didn t want to be in that room long at all It s a shame because otherwise I really would recommend this place   I thought the decor of this hotel was quite quirky and fun and also the staff were all extremely friendly and helpful The location was superb close to the Louvre and lots of nice places to eat

Hotel_Name: H tel Crayon Rouge by Elegancia
Full_Review: The hotel is in a great location for the sites and there are many small bars and restaurants in the immediate area The breakfast is a buffet served at a big table which was really friendly and was great to have a chat over breakfast with the other guests The room was spacious and comfortable and the staff were so helpful and friendly Would definitely recommend and we will go back on our next trip to Paris

Full_Review: The room could be a little bigger   Wonderful little place in the perfect location with personnel who goes out of their way to help you
The rooms were fairly small but not a problem   The breakfast was nice Good selection of foods to choose from Staff were welcoming and helpful The room was clean and comfortable

The room was extremely hot and the aircon not at all effective in fact I m not sure it was working at all The bed was very uncomfortable   Room was nicely decorated very clean and quite modern Bathroom was very modern and fresh The hotel was very quiet and in a side street which meant limited traffic Plenty of lovely restaurants within 5 minutes walk
Reception team was amazing and responsive They are clearly on top of their work unlike the Novotel Les Halles which I stayed in which was incredibly disorganised
Room was small but very comfortable   The staff were very friendly and helpful My room was very quiet and there was no extra charge for having breakfast in bed

the air conditioning was barely working they told me that paris never experiences outdoor temperatures like those 35C which is a total lie the motor was simply inadequate opening the window to get some fresh air from the outside instead was impossible because of the people on the street and in the bars enjoying themselves There are no ironing facilities in the room i went downstairs to get an iron and the guy had to run across the street to get one the rooms are small i was on the top floor and even if i m only 175cm i could barely fit my head under the shower paying all that money and having so little comfort is unacceptable   very close to gare du nord lots of restaurants and bars nearby

What we didn t like was nothing to do with the hotel but that we were robbed on the streets as we arrived on the first day That was down to our foolishness to trust strangers But as you can imagine it made us have rather low spirits at the start but your hotel staff were very kind and that helped a great deal   We found your hotel fine for our purpose and value for money and the staff were very friendly and helpful

Disappointed in the drinks facility as we had a proper coffee machine in Bordeaux A couple of biscuits may have been offered Proper tea and milk would also have been a bonus  The room was very well decorated and we asked for a quiet room and got one whch is amazing in Paris

I thought the street presentation of the hotel was lacking in that I found it difficult to see when I was on the street walking back to it after dining out I did not have too much wine   The hotel is very on trend if you like jazz and the room was decorated accordingly
small quantity of shampoo and shower gel products in the bathroom  The room was quiet clean and comfortable The location is good and the staff was perfect Best value for money
little too noizy for my taste from the street and from other room very light sound isolated   super comfy bed and pillow cozy and great sleep For Paris standard super continental breakfast
Very narrow lift reception looks very basic and doesn t really represent 4 star hotel  The memory foam pillows in the privilege room were very comfortable

the hotel room temperature was so warm we both found it difficult to sleep and did not have a great nights sleep on either night we turned the heating off along with the radiator but it was still very warm it was just unfortunate the street noise was quite high or we could have opened the window   the hotel was very clean and staff very attentive the location was also fantastic for both the sights and the train station even though we had issues with the room temp we would almost definitely stay again

Don t stay on the 6th floor If they put you there ask for another floor The ceiling cuts into the shower and you can t stand in the shower without hitting your head I literally had to shower on my knees They didn t seem to really care when I mentioned it either   Great location very convenient for walking to EVERYTHING in Paris Tons of shops and restaurants nearby

Wifi wasn t good as kept disconnecting every time I locked my phone Surrounding area is not the friendliest either   Loved the breakfast Everything you could want before going off into Paris So close to metro station which got us into Paris quickly Staff were helpful and room was good enough for us
Building work on the hotel kept us awake on the last morning   Amazing location So close to the metro and lots of lovely restaurants yet it was quite during the night as it s off the main road

on breakfast buffet write if there is lactose or gluten in things   AMAZING HOTEL very friendly staff very helpful muy buen hotel hotel tr s bien Molto bene fridge in room was very convenient very good breakfast buffet
lift was sooooooo small but it was ok   great little cosy hotel in a central location close to everything breakfast was fantastic id stay again no question

The water wouldn t turn hot or even warm in the shower It was very frustrating to take a cold shower The room was not completely sound proof and I could hear the people in the room next to me a bit   The room was very neat clean quite big and the bed comfortable Big bathroom Everything renovated and for the money it s a very good room

almost everything noise elevator was out of service and you have to carry your luggage for 5 stories staff was not cooperative and the price is extremely high  NOTHING except the wall decoration inside room

The beds could have been comfier they were very hard and it was 2 single beds pushed together   Breakfast was great Definitely worth the money Location was handy to everything and only a few minutes walk to the closest metro

Paris prices if you are on a budget you need to shop around to find the more reasonably priced bars restaurants   Really good Hotel great location close to Gard De Nord Station we travelled there by Eurostar and its only about 10 minute walk to the Hotel with easy access to Metro Buses and onto the attractions throughout Paris Room was very clean and quiet and the Hotel staff were very helpful and professional Paris is wonderful Recommended

Let me think No loved it all  All the staff were very helpful and welcoming The executive room was fantastic great shower My husband was very pleased to get a cooked breakfast the buffet was excellent This was our first visit to Paris and we would stay at this hotel again

But the shower is so tight that when I get in I cannot close the door My waist size is 36inches and I see no reason why it should be constructed like that The AC in the room did not cool the room properly   The hotel location is good It is close to shops and Gare De Nord train station which makes it easier to move around and get to the airport quickly The room I stayed in is quiet The room is very clean and the bed very comfortable The staff are nice too
the location is not very ideal a little far away from metro   Thanks to receptionist Marcel we have a very nice stay in Paris by the way the room is colourful and cozy

No room service no food other than breakfast room too small for 3 adults bathroom had only towels n soap worst room I stayed ever too expensive for what it is only one person at reception otherwise you ring a bell n wait   Mmm nothing really

We weren t told that the items in the bar fridge in the room were complimentary that would have been nice as we stayed there for 4 nights   Location was Ok Very good breakfast Rooms size for the 3 of us was OK
Staff came across quite rude at times   Hotel was lovely and quiet perfect for a business trip Facilities were spot on so was the location and the room was spotless
Our room was not ready when we arrived for check in and had to wait for a long time after what was a very tiring journey   Rooms are small but were comfortable

We found the location excellent with plenty of bars and restaurants It was also very near the metro for touring Paris The staff were particularly friendly and the breakfast was sourced with delicious local ingredients Would highly recommend it and would love to stay there again

Quiet modern hotel We had a room on the sixth upper floor which was very quiet and quite spacious Modern look also with a modern bathroom Good bed Good shower Friendly personnel speaks English Excellent breakfast buffet Good location to Gare du Nord and metro plenty of restaurants and cafes nearby

Privilege room was fantastic and very large for Paris Modern amenities and very clean Staff was very nice too The value for what I got was outstanding If I am back in this part of Paris I will definitely stay
Nothing really we had a nice stay   Lovely bedroom with everything fresh each day Breakfast was good with lots of choices Staff always helpful The restaurant next door was brilliant

Barely had such a wonderful helping and especially child friendly staff ever Big congrats And the location is heaven with 3 different metros round the corner and almost every 10 meters a great restaurant to discover

The room was very small for a 4 star hotel but I guess this is something common in Paris The sound proofing needs immediate improvement though The description states that the rooms are soundproofed but they were definitely not   The Mercure Paris Opera Grands Boulevards offered us an excellent value for money ratio especially considering the fact that our stay was during the Easter weekend and that our tariff included breakfast The staff was courteous and helpful and we were very satisfied by the cleanliness of our room At walking distance from sights such as the Louvre museum and the Sacre Coeur Basilica but the real upside of the location is that just 100m from the hotel rue de Chateau d Eau you can find some really vivid restaurant bars where mainly locals go

Nothing really it was quiet well serviced and the room was characterful and comfortable   Felt like the hotel was hidden away but actually very well located for so much We arrived from Gare Du Nord on foot after a ten minute walk and then walked everywhere we wanted to with ease Notre Dame Centre Pompidou etc There is a great restaurant and bar literally outside the front door Try the Bronco for lovely surroundings and perfect French cuisine
Room took time to get warm  The staff nadia victor were great felt right at home Any problems or directions they would help as much as they could

Too far from all metro stations in a city like Paris Rooms and beds are small Lobby is very small for groups There are only four seats available There s no possibility to sit and make short meetings with the groups Shower was leaking after taking shower bathroom was floating all over   Check in was fast and smooth Bastien welcomed us and was friendly and helpful Check out was easy with Marcel Other staff was also friendly and helpful Hotel was clean and neat overall There are good restaurants and cafes around

Maybe lack of Paris view But we liked the neighbors and the street life   Pretty much everything The location is great with three metro lines in 5 minute walking distance The staff were marvelous welcoming and ready to assist you in every manner We like to say one huge thanks to Nadia she made our check in out process smooth ad easy A great value for the money

We arrived from la Gare du Nord and then took the Metro to the suggested station in Hotel s page Chateau D Eau Walking in the neighborhood from there to the Hotel was quite disgusting   Small but clean rooms and excellent bed

Great location for Wembley arena Few minutes walk to the shipping outlets and parking available opposite Hotel itself was clean staff were welcoming and the room itself was modern and had everything you require Added bonus was a built in TV in the bathroom Very luxurious and a competitive price Breakfast in the morning was also good value and the quality was good

Complimentary bottle of wine was caulked Nothing in mini bar Staff unhelpful Room was good but had a hint of cigarette odour Price was double normal rate in excess of 400 for one night excluding breakfast No way is this a 4 star venue

The price was high but the hotel was of good quality The room was not cleaned when we approached the staff without making a fuss we asked for just clean towels it did not matter about the room that was not done neither We paid 573 so therefore we would have expected this do have been done When we told reception about it the next morning I would have expected a small discount as it was a lot of money for nothing   Excellent Location to Wembley Stadium
Restaurant was disappointing with only one server ordered pasta and tasted very strange and spicy and also menu s smelt   room and hotel was clean and modern

Food prices are rather expensive  I liked how water tea and coffee were provided in the rooms especially as it was such a hot day Also I was very grateful that staff had such hospitality made me feel very welcome
Air con hardley worked room was really hot parking is not great either  bathroom is really nice and enjoyed haveing a balcony to get fresh air and look over Wembley

The twin room we had was wonderful It had a nice size good beds everything very clean and modern quiet the door even has an alarm and the bathroom has a tv that you can watch in the bath It s not close to central London but you can walk through a pedestrianized area from Wembley Park Station that takes you to a shopping mall about 5 minutes from the hotel where there s cafe s and restaurants All in all it takes about 10 minutes or so to go from Wembley Park to the hotel or you can take a bus too Metropolitan takes you to Baker Street in about 15 min and Jubilee does it in about 25 min
Having to pay 25 per night deposit either by cash or credit card This was refunded on departure once room checked but not aware of this prior to booking
We were pleased to see receive a complimentary bottle of wine as we were staying at the hotel to see the Adele concert which was cancelled 24 hours before a nice touch

Breakfast was poorly organised and very ordinary   The hotel was fine but grossly overpriced due to the Adele concert and it was non refundable I have never spent so much on a hotel before and at nearly 400 each for the night it was extortionate The staff on the reception desk were exceptionally kind as I was really upset It was not a 400 per night room I would not have been there if it wasn t for the concert which was cancelled
As an event was cancelled last minute the room was not refundable not the hotels fault I know   Room upgrade was nice free bottle of wine
Price seems to have been hiked excessively solely because there was a concert at Wembley Happy to pay it but didn t realise how much cheaper the room was at other times

the caesar salad wasnt a delight to the eyes the taste was ok but it was more akin to a chicken coleslaw look   the staff went over and above what was expected from them the stadium is a very short walk away our room was large enough to be comfortable all in all a good find

Parking we had reserved a car park space in advance and despite arriving early there was only 1 space available Facilities for parking is poor and in total there are only approx 4 spaces as other spaces are being used for storage Restaurant was chaotic at times especially at breakfast and needs to be better managed not a great choice at breakfast   The location was ideal for Wembley Arena Staff very pleasant and room very comfortable

No room service being available due to the hotel being busy following an event at Wembley Stadium The comment we usually do room service but not tonight was not only disappointing but incredibly unhelpful to us   It was very close to Wembley Stadium

Very bad Air Con so room got very hot couldn t open Balcony Door as on a very noisy road which we knew as we wanted to be near Wembley Stadium so we did not get much sleep The breakfast was terrible see our photos of what was supposed to be Scrambled Egg Broccoli for breakfast with Lemon The fact that the room was 3 x that of its normal cost because we went to a concert at Wembley should make the hotel even more determined to give great service and food Don t stay there if you want to sleep in a cool room and have a decent breakfast   Clean Room and nice Towels

Everything suited us well   Staff were extremely friendly and helpful the visit as a whole was very enjoyable room was great and well serviced hotel location suited us perfectly as we were visiting Wembley Stadium 3 4 min walk for a concert and we also wanted to visit London Designer Outlet which is only two minutes away

No bathrobes no shower cap not a great selection of toiletries either  Very friendly accommodating staff the restaurant had a decent menu and we were able to have lunch late in the afternoon The room had a large TV USB and overseas plug sockets plenty of pillows and cushions The air conditioning worked and the room was quiet even though it was a busy Saturday night Excellent choice of breakfast food
More natural light in the room and easier car spaces to park in   Room had adjustable temperature and fan speed also adjustable lighting Nice clean room and bathroom Staff were lovely

Didn t appreciate being woken up by reception at 23 55 to be told a taxi which we hadn t ordered was waiting for us We were woken again at 08 50hrs on a Sunday morning by a maid wanting to clean the room check out wasn t until 11am Hairdrier not working in room   well placed for Wembley stadium Good selection at breakfast Lovely balcony on room
Food I am afraid Found the evening meal a little bland and too oily Cooked breakfast wasn t very hot   Room was excellent clean modern Very nice

Location is quite far from London centre and public transport zone 4 is not cheap However a hotel of this category in the centre would be at least double price Breakfast is too basic   The room was very modern clean and confortable Very close to Design District very nice shopping and reasonable food

Bed was not properly made the matress topper wasnt put on n the sheet was just over the bed there were small stains on the sheet 2single beds were pushed together rather than getting an actual doube bed and it wasnt very comfortable atall scatter cushions n throw for bed had visible stains and the shower had dirt on the floor n hadnt been cleaned for 131 00 i would expect better cleaning n comfort wise   Lovely looking place nice solid wood around room decent bathroom aircon

The cost but I guess it was on an event day so that should probably be expected The car park was full so 35 to park in the nearby Holiday Inn was unfortunate   The two chaps on reception were extra friendly efficient and helpful Great room excellent bathroom Really good and well priced restaurant too

Manager was very rude to me over the phone and hung up on me also booking com customer services very rude won t be booking again with booking com  Comfy bed Also lovely bath with tv in the bath I even fell asleep in the bath so relaxing

I didn t like the fact a hot buffet breakfast or cook to order wasn t included in the price of the stay Staff were very stiff and wooden at breakfast time there was no offer to get us drinks offer us a menu or even make us feel welcome Not good when you pay 284 per night The room service cut off was rediculous and there was no way you d get anything after the cut of time not good when you return 10 mins after there cut of point I am due to stay here in December again for a Gig and theprice is 130 quid so I may well cancel as I wasn t impressed by the food situation   Excellent choice however the prices had been significantly bumped up as we were seeing the stone roses The bath had a TV in which I guess is a bonus lol Lovely touches such as wine l biscuits and chocolates on arrival

No negatives against the hotel whatsoever If you are travelling by train just be prepared for the 10 minute walk from Wembley Park Station but you can always jump on the bus   We only had a one night stay at St George s for a concert at Wembley Stadium which is literally on the doorstep I m only sorry that we didn t get to stay longer The room was fantastic clean spacious and comfortable We ate in the La Regina restaurant for our evening meal and breakfast both meals were delicious Staff were friendly and helpful We would highly recommend this hotel and would most definitely stay again if we are ever in the area

It was not easy to find the hotel using Sat nav as it took us up the side street for the car park which was not sign posted however we called the hotel and the receptionist directed us to the hotel Great hotel superb location for Wembley too Very clea and would highly recommend it and we will use it again

Our room was lovely until the toilet broke it constantly flushed itself we reported the problem to staff who basically told us there was nothing they could do Once we d fallen asleep a board containing electricals dropped causing a loud bang exposing plugs belonging to the TV hairdryer etc which in turn woke us up and to top it off the milk for the complimentary coffee tea was rotten We eventually managed to change rooms we had no problems as all in the second room

The breakfast was very poor even for a continental breakfast I would expect more choice Staff didn t replace anything that had run out unless you asked and were not friendly at all   Comfortable bed lovely bathroom with TV Fridge was also very handy

The staff are not professionally trained as a staff opened my room without knocking in the very early morning The facility looks new however the door in my room was too rusted to open so I was locked and could not open the door inside the room fortunately got help from the staff in the end The towels are not clean as they were badly stained not sure if they changed it from previous occupants The aircon produced hot air not cold and it was noisy all night through Probably the worst experience I ve ever had Stay away from this hotel   The room is spacious

Check out was not great I found the person behind the desk a little rude answering the phone to several people as i m trying to check out also having a conversation with me about the car parking used I don t actually have a licence at all Maybe more staff are needed upon check out on busy weekends to avoid problems stress I also thought the room had a smoke smell to it the whole hotel is non smoking it wasn t a problem but could have been a issue for some Things like this made me think twice about the value for money side of things 2 nights cost me 415 in total Hotel bar informed us of warm beer ahead of buying drinks at lunchtime not sure why this was the case   Decent location small hotel so not loads of noise and I stayed on a busy weekend Staff at check in very helpful polite Breakfast was nice Bed was nice bathroom was large
Breakfast was too basic for the price   The rooms were lovely and spacious TV in the bath lovely restaurant and perfect location if going Wembley Stadium

More choices of food on the menu had no idea what most of the food was part of the shower was broken but the shower overall worked just fine so I wasn t too fussed  The bed was very big and comfy staff were really friendly and the location is right by Wembley Park so we was able to walk around the shops and get food The room itself was just amazing my partner loved it
The lift was broken the first night The a c was broken for 2 nights The door lock was broken the entire stay Checking out issues with credit cards was a big problem
I have nothing bad to say   The room and the location were great The bathroom with the tv and rain shower was a nice touch plus the view from the room
After the match at Wembley the hotel was locked as it was full and we had to bang on the door to get in as we had a room  Very nice rooms and fantastic location if visiting Wembley stadium

A selection of pillow sizes would have been good   Beautifully presented room Touch lighting was great TV in the bathroom was very quirky Really comfy bed Staff couldn t have done more to be helpful provide all assistance It s very convenient to Wembley Park area for gigs shopping Mall

We had to call reception as the door mechanism was very stiff and we thought we were stuck in the room The hotel did offer to move us to another room   The bathroom was super modern and the shower was divine Comfy beds and modern dimming lighting Breakfast was pleasant all the staff friendly and helpful Great location for events at Wembley

Breakfast was rubbish Coffee machine empty no juice no bowls to put the cereal in no egg cups for the boiled eggs And those croissants were clearly barely heated up frozen ones Definitely give the breakfast a miss   Room itself was good and spacious

Clean comfortable beds no noise from outside but unfortunately a herd of elephants in the room above around 1 2am Plenty of choice on the continental breakfast buffet and the staff all very helpful and friendly I thought the car park charge was a bit much 25 for a piece of spare space at the back but it was well secured Close to Wembley Arena which was the reason for our visit However the disabled wet room had a couple of minuses the shower floor should have had a rougher surface and I nearly slipped shower controls needed indication of what each was for as I got the full force on my head at one point and that was freezing Could have supplied a shower cap Disabled toilet pedestals are normally higher than provided there was no holder for toilet roll

The hotel is conveniently located to Wembley and Brent Civic centre the room was large you could definitely swing more than one cat There is a small fridge ideal for storing food items the free bottled water is placed in here so lovely and cold on a hot day Staff were lovely including the hotel cleaning staff their English may not be brilliant but their service and attitude definitely is

Having to provide 2 proof of ID as well as taking a 25 deposit on top of already paid for room cleaner on stilts upstairs banging around in the morning  Boutique styled room with comfy bed and tv in bath

The only issues we had were the remote for the TV in the bathroom had run out of batteries and the view wasn t the best but that wasn t why we were there   The staff were fantastic incredibly helpful The room was amazing the bath in particular was great and the bed was very comfortable Breakfast was good We didn t want for anything Overall an incredible hotel

Air conditioning was not working properly 27 28C first night although set at 20C Stuff tried to help temperature was lower following days but still wasn t working properly   Excellent value for money Rooms are very clear full of excellent ideas USB ports for charging cell phones touch screen adjustment of lights temperature by the bed Heated floor in bathroom big flat screen TV in the room plus as biggest surprise flat screen TV at the end of the bathtub With waterproof remote control Stuff friendly and helpful

That I still got charged for the room i didn t use because I had 1 day to cancel the rooms weren t joined and I stated we were a family of four when I booked with yourselves paying 25 to park your car that s a hidden cost a camp bed to be put in our room was extra 30 so in all not happy I won t book with yourselves again
aircon wasn t controllable from the room spent the night in a very hot room and didn t realise until checkout I should of call reception   the room was lovely

Nothing Everything exceeded our expectations and we had the best time   Me and my boyfriend were lucky enough to get a room on the back side of the building so we didn t have to worry about the noise from the main road and as a bonus we got a lovely view The room itself was very modern and had a very clean finish the bed was extremely comfortable
all good   very friendly staff and helpful the first room had a problem with the heating it was stuck on full heat phew they soon found me an alternative room the food in the restaraunt was very good
Struggled a bit not having a window that could open but appreciated the air conditioning  Breakfast croissants gorgeous Staff so very helpful Discount offered if booked again

Breakfast and being overcharged  Lovely clean modern Hotel with onsite parking charged at 10 per day and restaurant Restaurant menu is reasonably priced food is perfectly acceptable but nothing to rave about Friendly staff I ordered eggs benedict for breakfast priced at 6 on the menu but for some reason I was charged 12 50 price for full english and continental breakfast I couldn t eat the breakfast anyway as the poached eggs were hard the hollandaise sauce was more like cheese sauce it came with parma ham which was fatty and stringy and was served like a sandwich with half a muffin on bottom and half on top so I was charged more than double for something I didn t eat Waiter disappeared after bringing my breakfast so couldn t complain

Regina restaurant where you have breakfast and can have Italian food isn t really seperated and is open plan to the foyer Breakfast is served here continental which was included was adequate we upgraded to a full English which was absolutely awful and I left mine hard fried eggs beans in a seperated bowl but was swimming in grease bad quality sausages and bacon BUT the restaurant is good value both food and drinks considering your in London and the busyness reflected this We booked the restaurant for an evening meal prior to arriving based on the website thinking it was abit special but was badly let down again good value and ok food but I wanted it to be a special meal for my husband and myself   The room was excellent free extras wine water coffee tea biscuits chocolates big room great bathroom with tv in the bath Staff were very good polite and courteous Walking distant to Wembley Stadium which was great for us

We went to the boxing at Wembley after the fight we went back to the hotel to have a drink When we got there the hotel was full of NONE guests drinking in the bar it was over crowded and we couldn t get a drink so we went to our rooms to order some only to be told there to busy to offer us room service there was also fights breaking out amongst none residents in the bar  Location and standard of rooms
I can t find a fault in all honesty  Was incredibly comfortable being able to control the temperature of the room at all times was a huge plus for me

Couldn t smoke in balcony And on arrival there was a 20 deposit taken which I wasn t happy about nor aware Shame there isn t any gym or swimming pool otherwise the hotel is nice  The bed was so comfy Had the best sleep after ages If only I asked where the mattress was from

Could not control the room temperature from the room had to call reception every time I wanted it changed   The location was great just a walk over to the designer outlet and many restaurants to choose from I loved the fact there was on site parking for a small fee George on front desk was fantastic great enthusiasm and excellent customer service All the staff were very attentive to the guests needs and requirements

Only thing to keep in mind is that the windows of the standard rooms at the back cannot be opened If you like fresh air then this can be a draw back You ll depend on the air conditioning for the temperature control in your room   The hotel is located at a 20 minute walk from Wembley Park tube station The walk from the station is pleasant and safe The rooms are spacious for London standards They are tastefully decorated and the bathrooms are state of the art Sound proofing is excellent and assures quiet and restful nights The wifi connection free of charge was fast and efficient Check in was quick and painless accompanied by friendly smiles from the staff

Breakfast was good But the hotel should consider to double the service staff at least I m the weekend and or peak hours One person is not able to manage it allone   Very friendly staff Answering patiently all questions Even preparing a birthday cake and a decoration of the room on request The room is very clean new and modern A paid car park in the backyard

For the week we ve been there you couldnt change the Air conditionner from your room not even turn it off you have to call the reception to change the air conditionner We had a problem in our bathroom couldnt change the water temperature We complained 5 times the problem has never been addressed and they never offered us another room We took mildly cold shower for 1 week Average location 12 minutes walking from all metro stations Breakfast quite poor for the price The products are bad quality and few choice  Very sympathetic receptionists they love their job Wonderful finishing quality of the lights and decoration in the room

I just didn t like the Room I got cause there was not doors to open to get fresh air in the room and also I have no view of outside just a side window which I was just looking at the side build that room was 508 on the 5th floor   I love how friendly and polite the staff that deal with me were and also the bed was very comfortable and just how I like it the place was very clean and fresh i have been there many times and will not stop coming to that hotel on a scale of 10 I would give a score of 9 I enjoyed my stay

Breakfast both days was a disaster everything run out continuously haven t to chase for juice bread etc This was my second visit I was really impressed with my first very disappointed with my 2nd don t think there will be a 3rd  TV in the bath

House keeping walked into the room at 8am even with the do not distrub light on They didn t even knock I had to leave the hotel just after 10am for a meeting I informed reception that I would be back just before or shortly after 12pm and would this be ok The receptionist told me that this would be no problem I returned to the hotel at 12 20pm I asked reception if they would charge my key so I could get my stuff to check out I was then told that house keeping packed my stuff into my bag and they left it at reception Under no circumstances should anyone from the hotel touch personal belongings of a guest I had permission from the receptionist to check out shortly after 12pm which I was there to do I was disgusted to think that hotel staff would do such a thing In all my years traveling to hundreds of hotels I have never experienced this total disregard for a guest and their property I didn t have time to discuss this with the manager on checkout as I had to drive to catch a ferry but sent an email to the manager They informed me that it was a breakdown in communication between the reception and housekeeping No communication should be needed to tell housekeeping staff that they do not touch a guests belongings without the guests permission

The air conditioning was too hot and we couldn t make it colder it was uncomfortable for us we asked for help if they fix the conditioning   Everything was really great from TV to bed to Window and to bathroom however it was just the air conditioning was really terrible and uncomfortable
Nothing on this stay  Arrived at 02 45 hrs met with night staff very helpful room perfect for my stay Def use again Small car park but reserved a place had no problems 5 star

All very nice   Everything was very nice polite staff and nice facilities comfortable bed and room near to SSE Wembley Arena we will come back soon for other events highly recommend this place there was a tv in the bath
Loved everything   Loved how kind and attentive the staff were I was given a room with a shower and wanted to have a bath so on request my room was changed immediately
Room was not cleaned during our stay Not even removing the trash from room even after we requested from reception  Good hotel with reasonable price for car parking

Everything It was a better night sleep on the floor rather than on the rock hard bed The rooms are tiny no room at all in the bathroom Absolutely appalling hotel and when I asked to speak to the manager I was told they were unavailable DO NOT STAY HERE   Pro Location although views were terrible

The room had previously had a smoker stay in it The dining area was poor you look out onto a bus stop the restaurant waitress hardly spoke English and barely understood me   The man at reception in the middle of the afternoon was fabulous I was happy when they changed my room without any fuss after I complained that someone had been smoking in it previously despite no smoking signs everywhere The bedrooms were so nice and the bed fantastic so comfortable The lighting was great and the TV amazing the bathroom and shower was wonderful
parking was not well sign posted but a simple phone call made to reception made it very easy   great service and great hotel better than the hilton accross the road parking was cheap

The only issue is that it got cold at night as the air con stopped so I woke from this and had to turn it back to a warmer temp but that s the only downside throughout the stay   The TV in the bath tub was a nice touch the the already amazing bathroom Beds are really comfortable The TV is a generous size and connectivity to it is nice and easy along with other connection options like bluetooth and 3 5mm headphone jack are a good touch The location is great if you plan on going to a game at Wembley of just fancy a shopping trip with the outlet mall near by But parking is limited and it s a first come first served basis as they have limited spaces at a fair charge We all enjoyed out time at this prestigious hotel without being over priced and the staff are very friendly
The room kept resetting itself to 21 which was way too hot when we got in after a night out  Ideally located walking distance from Wembley stadium and parking was cheap

breakfast very average at best touch senstive lights came on every hour or two throughout night couldnt sleep would have been better off getting up at 4am and driving whole point was to rest before manic day   Clean good location
Very friendly and helpfull staff I only stayed for a night but would come here anytime again Perfect location for concerts shopping and sightseeing Really comfy
The basin is too small I have to take a shower rather than wash my face simply  I love the bed extremely comfort I don t want to get up in the morning

I could not fault anything about my stay it really was excellent   From the moment I entered the hotel until the moment I left the service I received was impeccable The hotel itself has a very smart and sophisticated decor The room was beautiful great size comfy bed smart lighting and even a TV in the bath I will be staying here more frequently now I know about this hidden gem
N a  Amazing experience from the staff there especially Ana the manger great hospitality Ana was understanding and made my stay at St George s worth the stay

The walls between the rooms are so thin it doesn t seems sound proof really noisy you can hear really loud footstep from upstair or around you And the quality of the bed sheets are really bad pillow is really uncomfortable
A bit difficult to locate the car park   It was a perfect location for the Wembley half marathon and my wife liked the Shopping Outlet so both of us were very happy

I had difficulty in working out the intricacies of the showers The sink plug did not engage so no sink full of water for shaving I did report this on leaving   In general I was impressed by the welcome and cleanliness of the hotel
Car park a bit small If you have a large car   The beds are comfortable and location is perfect if using the stadium for a show or concert Staff are very accommodating

Misleading info regarding breakfast Booking form said Full English Breakfast is available at 5 but we had to pay 7 50 for continental and were told we would have had to pay an additional 5 for full English Despite the clear breaking of The Trade Descriptions Act we were not offered any reduction We re also disappointed that e mails to the hotel prior to our stay relating to an earlier cancelled booking remain unanswered

Hot waterin bathroom wasn t really hot enough At breakfast could ve had more cutlery available   Super modern dimmerable lights huge tv fab bathroom with tv over bath Even interior lights in the wardrobe Bed and pillows really comfy Very clean and tidy

Bed was extremely comfy and also there was a touch panel next to the bed which controlled the A C and lighting of the room which was really cool Room was standard size for a London hotel but very clean and excellent non the less Staff are professional and courteous

Fantastic location for Wembley Stadium and Arena Clean modern facilities And wonderfully helpful friendly staff who arranged food delivery to our room when the concert we attended ended much later than intended We had the most fantastic weekend though Loved the lighting system in the room with dimmer switches and all manner of buttons

Sadly we had no hot water on the first morning We rang reception and reported it We had to go out without a shower We were told it was fixed when we got back to find that it wasnt When we complained we were moved to another room We complained on departure and we were told the manager wasnt in but that she would contact us shortly after our stay We are still waiting So disappointing If it hadn t have been for this our rating would be top marks It s not the problem it s how it s dealt with   On the face of it the hotel is very well fitted out The beds were comfortable and the staff friendly Dinner in the restaurant was very good Very close to Wembley Stadium station

We had stayed at this hotel on other occasions and had booked an executive room which was a lot larger than the one we stay in on this occasion so we think we was given what was order however our stay was still lovely and the room was still comfy and cosy   The room was very clean and comfy we had a great night sleep and was going to book another night if it wasn t for work and other commitments The staff member who checked us in Marcus was extremely helpful and polite
We stayed here on our honeymoon we got a complementary upgrade to an executive room and they had put rose petals all over the bed and a lovely bottle of wine for us to share fab x

The receptionist was very helpful and his customer services was exceptionally good it s a shame I didn t get his name The room was very clean and beautiful too and lovely the bathroom was absolutely nice and the bed was very comfortable even though it was just for a night I enjoyed it a lot planning to come back very soon
Nothing it was perfect  The customer service was excellent The bed was very comfortable The balcony and view was very good The room was very clean and tidy

I asked why did they call it st george hotel to a staff but didnt know the answer but its okay because i was jst curious The tv from the toiler didnt work and cant be turned on   Comfy bed very relaxin feeling once u step in the room
Continental breakfast could be improved by sourcing fresh croissants  This hotel is perfectly located for any Wembley event and offers extremely comfortable facilities at a reasonable price

I didn t like the location of the room because I could hear the traffic even when the windows were shut   The bed was comfortable The receptionist when we checked in was a very nice young man He is a credit to the hotel

Limited toiletries first room given to us smelt very smokey and the bathroom was not 100 clean We were instantly offered another room Modest room size  Bed very comfy only one chair good standard of fittings

The bathroom needed some clothes hooks on the wall or door no where to hang anything Also the touch light switches were nice but we had a constant glow from them throughout the night   Staff all very friendly and helpful great location for Wembley Arena
The smell in our room was suspicious Not sure if we were above a vent or a door was left open and someone was smoking outside an interesting herbal substance   Location room size parking

The lock on our bathroom didn t work The room had a strong smell of cannabis every time we came back into the room Loud banging throughout the night Windows are quite thin could hear everything outside Air con wasn t amazing Toilet was constantly running  Beds were really comfy Lighting in the rooms Really close to Wembley Spacious Clean and tidy Really modern

Can be slightly noisy from the other rooms we were woke Twice by idiots partying at 3 am The hotel stopped in immediately   All of the staff were very friendly Italian restaurant maybe open to the reception but is excellent And is very reasonable

Freezing cold restaurant too close to the door that seemed to be used a through fare for all All draught beer pumps out of order and a overpriced menu for the quality Poor restaurant service   Clean warm and comfortable rooms

This hotel is exactly how they ve described it great value for money with lovely cosy clean rooms I really value customer service and I received excellent service from the staff particularly the front office manager Ana Cazacu who was very courteous welcoming and assisted promptly with any issues I had Very good restaurant attached to it too It is definitely my first choice hotel in North West London
This hotel was booked in haste but was absolutely stunning lovely friendly staff and complimentary late check out Thanks for a great stay Ps Great food in the restaurant too

We had some trouble with the electronic key card to access the room We had to get the card scanned about 3 times to try to get it to work In the end they gave us the manual key to use I realise this isn t a huge negative but when you d driven 5 1 2 hours to get there it s not ideal Having to go back and fourth to the desk The staff were very helpful though Also the room smelled of smoke when we walked in despite it being a no smoking room   The room was very spacious and the facilities are very hi tech and modern
Breakfast was a bit pricey at 13 50  Lovely hotel clean high spec throughout very comfy bed staff were pleasant and very helpful self service continental breakfast I would definitely stay here again

Everything was lovely No negative comment  Everything about this hotel is good Thr rooms are really nice and the staffs were very helpfully But Ana the front desk manger had outstanding costumer service and she was extremely nice I would definitely come back again
Pretty much liked everything   Excellent room spacious all mod cons and very clean Good bathroom All air conditioned Giant flat screen Will certainly go again
total experience was excellent very attentive and polite staff good service room and restaurant very good very good value for money Would recommend this hotel to colleagues

Absolutely nothing it was perfect  Absolutely amazing we turned up before 12 with check in at 3 we were expecting to just drop our bags off and then go out but the receptionist couldn t have been more helpful she checked if the room was ready as we were so early it wasn t but she upgraded us to a superior room and let us check in early the room was absolutely amazing and heated bathroom floors which were hot enough to dry wet socks on one of the best hotels I ve ever stopped in

10 to 15 minutes walking to undergrand station Poor wifi   Friendly staff thanks for Ana and Anderia Modern room and bathroom 2 minutes to designer outlet with alot of shopping and dinning I will visit this hotel again

Car parking is limited and was full when I arrived advise booking ahead Restaurant could expand menu a little  Comfortable well appointed rooms Automatic lighting control and aircon in bedroom and bathroom meant relaxing atmosphere The TV in the bath was a bonus feature
It was an ok stay London is expensive and this location certainly was not the best for my purpose But I can see the appeal if you are interested in Wembley events

Although it was great to have Wembly Stadium as our balcony view we found the traffic noise a little intrusive especially early in the mornings The glass appeared to be double glazed but it sounded like a window was open all the time The room that we had was quite small There was only room for 1 chair so you had to sit on the bed   Very pleasant and helpful staff nothing was too much trouble The whole hotel was spotlessly clean and inviting and the bed was so comfy The restaurant was great and the food was reasonably priced and delicious too Really enjoyed watching tv whilst relaxing in the bath very indulgent The bus stopped right outside the hotel and the tube was a 5 min stroll away We would be extremely happy to return to this hotel and to recommend it to friends family and you too
Breakfast was little bit simple but everyrhing else was excellent  Staff was kindly and the room was perfect The hotel location is very close to Wembley stadium
Prior to my stay I had stayed in st George s hotel and my room had heated flooring During my stay recently I realised that it didn t which was disappointing   Bed was very comfortable
The room was beautiful and extremely cosey Staff were brilliant The hotel is 2 mins away from the London Designer Outlet which is great for shopping eating etc Will definitely be staying here again

Nothing no complaints at all   Got a beautiful new room everything up to date Staff very friendly and an excellent location for Wembley Arena Had a room onto a side street so no view but very quiet Can t comment on food as we didn t eat there

I was a little disappointed that the bar was closed on our return to the hotel around 11pm and again the restaurant was closed the following day when we checked out we had hoped to grab a coffee and a quick bite to eat before leaving   This hotel was a little more expensive than our usual picks however the room was lovely very modern and clean The bed was very comfortable and the TV in the bath was just amazing The staff were friendly and helpful The hotel was handy for us as it is only a short walk from Wembley arena and we were visiting London for a concert

Wasnt prompted about free wifi if it was available but that didnt bothor me too much  Location was perfect Room was exceptional Not too big or small very intimate Beautiful bathroom and tv in bath was a extra perk

There was a slight old mop smell on the lobby corridor   Very unassuming building small and out of the way however got a very nice view from our room got the executive double room Staff were friendly when I called to request champagne flutes and gave us complementary free late check out despite us giving only about 10 minutes notice The Italian restaurant inside the hotel is quite nice as well quite a nice little surprise

The only thing that runined a little bit of my night was that our room was next to the car park so it can get noisy when busy   I enjoyed the politeness of all staff I interacted with The rooms were very spacious and clean and look Excatly like the management photos Although I only stayed a night I will surely exten my stay in the future

The breakfast was dire Cheap ham slices cut in half a bit of salami and cold eggs The toaster took forever and only did one side at a time No selection no quality whatsoever and no service whatsoever Shame as the hotel is very smart   Lovely hotel Very stylish and a spacious room which had all mod cons

We were put in a room with just a shower at first however we rang reception and asked to be moved to a room with a bath and it wasn t a problem Also parking in the hotel you have to reserve and it s 25 but the holiday inn opposite allow you to park and its 10 per night in a secure car park   Room was lovely and bed was was really comfy had the best sleep and we felt like there was enough food for breakfast so didn t feel the need to upgrade Tube station 10 min walk so easy access to the centre Designer shopping outlet opposite hotel didn t have many shops

Not so much didn t like but worth noting that there is limited parking at the hotel which you need to book in advance I wasn t aware of this I parked in The Holiday Inn over the road and walked over which wasn t an issue but maybe could be better highlighted when booking   The hotel was a real surprise very modern and clean all staff I met were extremely helpful and professional Had a great night sleep and was very reasonably priced I don t often head into the restaurant when I m on my own but I did on this visit The food was very good quality and I felt didn t feel in comfortable at all I will definitely stay here again when I need to stay over in Wembley

The bed was not very soft and quite solid so not a lot of sleep but it was such a lovely room and hotel in total  The staff were amazing and so friendly and even gave me and my partner a free upgrade to a massive luxury suite xx

The room maid kept entering the room despite the sleeping sign on outside the door which woke me up twice   The customer service upon arrival from Ana was amazing and was offered a room upgrade which was nice The hotel is in a great location with links into central london in less than 10 minutes Very clean

Our only complaint was the very loud music on the TV in the restaurant at breakfast easy listening music please   Very good location excellent value for money and good continental breakfast more than enough choice lovely bathroom polite staff
Helpful staff Cozy hotel Very good connectivity Plenty of charging outlets in room 3 of which were USB outlets TV built in the wall by the bathtub

We got back to the hotel at 11 and the bar was already shut so had to go out again Would be nice to have a nightcap before going to bed   Location was great Room was very nice Only complaint was the bath plug didn t hold the water Very comfortable with friendly staff

Wifi was not working the whole stay The reception staff was friendly but lack information about simple touristic attraction and major events like the world travel market  Food in the restaurant was great

The only problem with the touchscreen system was that after approximately 30 minutes the lights and tv went off This was annoying and happened while I was taking a bath I had to get out anc put them back on If I m in the room the lights should stay on until I turn them off or leave the room   The bed was very comfortable the touchscreen system for lights and other amenities was excellent apart from one small problem Friendly staff good location for using the SSE

Extremely small room with a view of dingy back gardens of neighbouring houses and the car park through a 6 wide window At 180 plus 25 for parking it was expensive breakfast costs extra Food in restaurant was just ok had to wait a long time for a pizza and when it arrived didn t have the chilli that i requested and was basically just a hard flatbread pizza with a few vegetables scattered haphazardly on top leaving a lot of the pizza as just plain cheese   Soft and comfortable bed lovely bathroom and great location for wembley arena
Cooked breakfast was cold and very mediocre for such an expensive hotel  Location is perfect if you re there for a Wembley event 3 4 minute walk if that

Bar restaurant not owned by hotel so not open when we returned from event Staff recommended hotel across the road which was fine though Disappointed that the price for the next time we would like to be there is over 600 for a room Obviously due to the event but ridiculous so have gone elsewhere   Really comfortable bed in a room with all mod cons Excellent sound proofing ensured a good night sleep Very friendly staff providing efficient service Excellent location for Wembley events

The mattress was a little too soft for my liking and pillows too hard for my liking but husband liked both   The staff where so friendly the restaurant was lovely And the rooms were clean and huge We stayed in a superior room with view Walking distance to Wembley

The bed was slightly on the hard side   We stayed at the hotel for 2 nights From the moment we arrived Anna the receptionist was brilliant We were upgraded to a superior room Check in was very efficient We needed parking for an extra day as we wanted to go sightseeing Anna sorted this out when we checked in Anna made me feel looked after and as a first point of contact was an excellent representation for the hotel I would definitely stay here again Room was spacious and clean The TV in the bathroom was so good to relax We had a cooked breakfast which was really nice
Really loved the different sizes of cushions My first brilliant night s sleep outside of my own bedroom in years My husband loved the shaving mirror He ordered one on our return

Nothing  We visited last year and enjoyed our stay so much that we decided to book the hotel again this year for our pre Christmas visit The staff were very helpful and even changed one of our rooms so we all had a bath with the TV in the bath We did not have breakfast at the hotel as we found that a bit too pricey but there are plenty of restaurants and cafes in the designer outlet across the road
The noise above my room 509 and poor service for breakfast had to get tea and food else where No manager on site to take any complaints and nothing was done to help   Close to stadium

The full english breakfast we had was awful My dog would have left that im glad we didnt eat in the resturant Minus 10 for the food   The staff were very polite and helpful The decor was good and overall the hotel was clean

Parking limited and cramped also a bug bear having to pay extra however it seems to be more the norm now in London  Contemporary well presented room which exceeded expectations proper comfy bed and shower was wicked and loved the tv built in to the wall in the bathroom only thing missing was company

Temperature of the room wouldn t turn down No air con Spent the night very hot Wasn t the only one Another room had same problem Didn t think reception could do much at midnight though So stuck it out Also would be nice if I had options on my breakfast instead of get what you get attitude 6 beans on a mini plate and runny eggs not my thing   I liked the room with its touch button lighting and the little touches of the tv in the bath Very clean

All staff were professional and extremely friendly The room was large clean and modern Loved the TV in the bathroom bit of a luxury but nice Travelled to the O2 to watch the tennis Access was really easy via the tube Evening food in the restaurant was of good quality as was the breakfast Great hotel will stay again each time I visit London
Missing hair dryer in the bathroom noise from outside traffic   Exceptional room I was impressed by facilities design cleaning and not least the bed was very comfortable

The staff were very friendly and helpful the rooms were extremely clean and luxurious with nice gadgets to top it off such as the waterproof TV in the bathroom This hotel is clean and classy just like the pictures online Very nice experience

Nothing Had a view of the car park on level one would have like a better view But it s not always possible   Greeted by lovely staff room was amazing Bed was super comfy Rooms are very modern Mood lighting which was nice
